chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 2025 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA NO.7942/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on MA No.7943/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA NO.7944/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 01.12.2025 Mr. Sufizada Zaheer Muhammad, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Admittedly, the FIR bearing Crime No.953 of 2025 registered with Police Station, Sargodha, Punjab, the quashment thereof has been sought through instant Constitutional Petition, does not fall within the territorial jurisdiction of this Court, hence this Court cannot entertain this Petition. Accordingly, the same being misconceived is hereby dismissed in limine along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
